fields.title: Sample DMV Practice Test
fields.description: Practice test for Minnesota driver's permit

fields.text: What should you do at a red traffic light?
fields.explanation: A red light means you must come to a complete stop before the crosswalk or stop line.

fields.text: Slow down and proceed if clear
Speed up to get through quickly

fields.title: Minnesota Road Signs Practice Test
fields.description: Test your knowledge of Minnesota road signs. Each question shows a traffic sign - select the correct meaning.

fields.text: What does this road sign mean?
fields.explanation: A STOP sign means you must come to a complete stop. Stop at the marked stop line or before entering the crosswalk. If there is no stop line or crosswalk, stop before the intersection. Yield right-of-way to pedestrians and to vehicles in or approaching the intersection.

fields.text: What does this road sign indicate?
fields.explanation: The YIELD sign means you must slow down and give vehicles crossing your path the right-of-way. If necessary, stop before entering a crosswalk or at the point nearest the intersecting roadway where you can see approaching traffic.

fields.text: What does this warning sign mean?
fields.explanation: The DEER CROSSING sign warns that deer frequently cross the roadway in this area. Be especially alert for deer during dawn, dusk, and nighttime hours.
A STOP sign requires all vehicles to come to a complete stop.

fields.text: Slow down and proceed with caution
fields.explanation: This is incorrect. A STOP sign requires a complete stop, not just slowing down.

fields.text: Stop only if other vehicles are present
fields.explanation: This is incorrect. You must stop at a STOP sign regardless of whether other vehicles are present.
A YIELD sign means you must let other vehicles go first.
This is incorrect. A YIELD sign doesn't require a complete stop unless necessary for safety.
This is incorrect. A YIELD sign requires you to slow down and be prepared to stop if necessary.

fields.text: Watch for deer crossing the road
fields.explanation: This sign warns drivers to be alert for deer crossing the roadway.
This is incorrect. The sign warns about deer crossing the road, not about hunting areas.
This is incorrect. The sign specifically warns about wild deer crossing the road, not a zoo area.
